name: Ideal Weight Calculator
desc: Calculate your ideal weight for your height using Lorentz and Devine formulas.
description: Calculate your ideal weight for your height using Lorentz and Devine formulas.
seo_description: Find your ideal weight range by height and gender using proven formulas. Free ideal weight calculator with instant, easy-to-read results.
example_label: Determine weight ideal to hombre of 175cm of height
result_context: The range of weight saludable is based in IMC 18.5-24.9; the fórmuthe Lorentz and Devine ofrecen estimacion is alternativas.
formula_display: Weight minimum = 18.5 × height (m)²; weight maximum = 24.9 × height (m)²
steps: Convert height a meters (ej: 175 cm = 1.75 m)
Opcional: Calculate fórmuthe Lorentz and Devine to referencia
mistakes: Confusing weight ideal with weight of model (can ser insalubre)
Not considering complexión ósea (huesos grand is = weight greater saludable)
Use fórmuthe old as Hamwi without update a evidencia current
